description_long: This is a freestanding shelving unit with a rectangular, white frame and three open shelves. The bottom section features three wooden storage bins with cut-out handles, one of which is pulled out and placed in front of the unit. The shelves are spacious and flat, suitable for storing books, decor, or other items. The wooden bins contrast visually with the white shelving, adding a touch of warmth and functionality. The back and sides of the unit are solid, with no visible openings or glass panels. The overall design is modern and practical, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or community spaces.
description: A white rectangular shelving unit with three open shelves and three wooden storage bins at the bottom, one bin pulled out in front. The design is modern and functional, with contrasting wood and white finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves and three wooden bins, with one bin pulled out in front.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the shelving unit and the wooden bin placed beside it.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid back panel of the shelving unit, with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and the wooden bin placed beside the unit.
